item.title: My Antigravity CLI-Based Personal Assistant
item.description: An AI assistant built using the Google Antigravity CLI to help with daily tasks, proactive reminders, and automated agentic trading.

item.title: How I built my own assistant app?
item.description: I have vibe coded my own assistant app to track bills, credit card benefits, upcoming travel and more. Here is how I did it.

item.title: Skills in ADK and A2A v1.0
item.description: Enhance your agent's capabilities with skills and expose them over A2A

item.title: Automating PR Fixes with Antigravity
item.description: Leverage Agent Skills to automate code changes for addressing review comments

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: Welcome to my blog! I look forward to sharing my learnings in AI, software engineering, and my journey as a developer.
